title: Economic Bulletin - ECB Publication Landing Page
summary: This is a container/listing page for ECB Economic Bulletins, not a specific analytical document. The page describes what the Economic Bulletin is (policy decision basis, released eight times yearly) and lists previous release dates. No actual economic data, projections, inflation figures, growth analysis, or macro catalyst information is contained in this source.
key_points: Source is a navigation/listing page for ECB Economic Bulletin publications
Economic Bulletins released eight times yearly, two weeks after monetary policy meetings
March, June, September, December issues include staff macroeconomic projections
Latest release listed is Issue 1, 2026 (19 February 2026)
Next release: Issue 2, 2026 scheduled for 2 April 2026
No specific economic data or catalyst information present in this page
why_it_matters: This is a meta-page about ECB publications rather than an actual economic report. It does not contain data suitable for macro catalyst analysis. Per Rule 8, navigation/listing pages must be rejected.

issues_found: Source is a navigation/listing page - contains no substantive macro catalyst data
Per Rule 8: navigation_page types must not be accepted
No economic projections, inflation figures, growth data, or catalyst information present
Archive value is too low - only provides access points to actual reports
No specific numerical evidence or analytical content

notes: Low-quality source for macro catalysts research. This is a container page describing the ECB Economic Bulletin publication series with release dates. No substantive economic analysis, data points, or catalyst information is present. The source itself is not relevant to market structure or macro catalysts as defined - it merely provides access points to where such information could be obtained. Recommend indexing specific release PDFs instead.
